Bus Timings

F03 Bus Timetable From Rashidiya Bus Station Parking to Street 65A and Loop Back

August 25, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Whether you’re heading to Etihad Mall for shopping, commuting to work, or simply navigating the Mirdiff area, Bus F03 provides a reliable and affordable transit option. With its strategic stops and frequent service, the F03 route plays a key role in enhancing Dubai’s public transport network.

Operational Details

The F03 bus operates throughout the day, catering to both early morning commuters and evening travelers.

From Rashidiya Bus Station Parking From Street 65A
04:02 04:33
05:05 05:36
05:14 06:36
06:05 07:06
06:17 07:41
06:35 08:11
07:10 08:46
07:17 09:16
07:40 09:56
07:47 10:31
08:15 10:51
08:22 11:16
08:45 12:06

09:25 13:31
09:27 14:11
09:57 15:11
10:00 16:01

10:45 17:43

14:40 00:49

Bus F03 Timetable

For the complete schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow the link for F03 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The cash ticket for Bus F03 is priced at AED 3, with payments made using the Nol card, a convenient cashless option for Dubai’s public transport system. The Nol card can be easily topped up at various locations throughout the city, ensuring smooth and hassle-free travel.

Route Overview

The F03 bus route starts at Rashidiya Bus Station Parking and makes its way through key residential, shopping, and community areas before returning to the station. Below are some notable stops along the route:

  1. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking The starting and final stop of the route.

  2. Etihad Mall A popular shopping center with retail and dining options.

  3. Mirdiff, Private School A stop located near educational institutions in Mirdiff.

  4. Uptown Mirdif A major residential and commercial area with amenities.

  5. Etisalat Tower A stop near a key telecommunications hub.

  6. Elyazia Beauty Center Catering to visitors of local beauty and wellness services.

  7. Mirdiff Masjid, Street 15 A community stop for local residents.

  8. 12th Street Access to residential neighborhoods.

  9. Street 29B A stop serving local residential areas.

  10. Street 65A Another key residential stop in the Mirdiff area.

  11. 47th Street Providing access to additional Mirdiff neighborhoods.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. 78th Street A stop serving residents in this area.

  2. Golden Gate Mall, Street 71 A retail destination for shoppers in Mirdiff.

14.

Accessibility Features

The RTA ensures that public transport in Dubai is accessible to all passengers.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

The F03 route offers seamless connectivity with other public transportation options, especially at Rashidiya Bus Station, where passengers can transfer to various bus routes and the Dubai Metro. This ensures convenient travel across the city, whether you’re commuting locally or traveling further.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

  • Etihad Mall

  • Uptown Mirdif
  • Golden Gate Mall

Journey Experience

A trip on Bus F03 takes passengers through some of Dubai’s residential and commercial hubs. Passengers can enjoy a smooth and scenic ride through well-developed areas, making the journey both convenient and comfortable.

Tips and Travel Advice

  • Travel during off-peak hours to avoid crowded buses at popular stops like Etihad Mall.

  • Ensure your Nol card is topped up before boarding to avoid delays.
  • Download the RTA app for real-time updates and schedules for Bus F03 and other routes.

Bus F03 is a crucial part of Dubai’s public transport system, offering reliable and frequent service between Rashidiya Bus Station and Mirdiff.

Whether you’re commuting to work or running errands, the F03 ensures a smooth journey through key areas of the city. For real-time updates and more information, visit the RTA website or download the RTA app to enhance your travel experience. To explore the full list of bus routes across Dubai, check here for more details.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 25, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
